text: Kelizaza n…Ыv…Фl…Ф…Ф, ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы av…Ы Owusoso AkaavuћГ…Ф shu k…Ыl…Ы bakpaћА banun…Ф b…Фd…ФћГ …Фkas…Ы as…Ы g…Ы betse…Цe al…Ы ana. G…Ы ban…ФluћГazazaћГ gbagbla n…ЫћА y…Ы…Фbhia al…Ы ebeku…Ф, bekulu …Фham…ЫeshesheћА…Ы, g…Ыinu ban…Ф shesheћА k…Ыzaa petee n…Ы Israel, k…Ыl…Ы bakp…Ы ban…Ф n…Ы ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы g…Ыbakp…Ы n…Ы …Ф…ЦavuћГ…Ф …Фk…Ф.

ref: The temple police who were sent to the jail did not find the apostles. They returned and said,
text: P…Ф g…Ы bav…Ы ediku …Ф…ЦavuћГ…Ф shu…Ф, …Ф…ЦavuћГabha e…Цi…Цielete…Ы ag…Ы dam…Ф ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы n…ЫuvuћГ…Ф m…Ы, kliso betsyina av…Ы ed…Ыk…Ф tititiћА,

ref: вАЬWe found the jail locked tight and the guards standing at the doors. But when we opened the doors and went in, we didn't find anyone there.вАЭ
text: вАЬB…Фd…Ыm…Ф …Фs…Ы buduluћГ…Ф pete daћГa piapii, k…Ыl…Ы bag…Ы epo k…Ыl…Ы tsy…Ы eli kititiћА n…Ы buduluћГ…Ф, p…Ф g…Ыb…Ф dal…ЫћГ buvu…ФћГ, bag…Ыm…Ф ananaћА n…Ы b…Фl…Ы m…ЫћА.вАЭ

ref: The captain of the temple police and the chief priests listened to their report, but they did not know what to think about it.
text: G…Ы beluћГ kibui …Ыl…Ы, k…Ыbh…Ыt…Ы ag…Ы e…Цi akaavuћГ…Ф nabha n…ЫћА ban…ФluћГazazaћГ gbagbla n…Ыibi, g…Ы begiluћГ k…Ыl…Ы esi k…Ыl…Ы bazaћГ n…ЫћА …Фw…ФћГny…Фn…Ф n…Ы k…Ыg…Ы badekoeyiћА n…Ы kibui …Ыl…Ы m…Ы.

ref: Just then someone came in and said, вАЬNow those men you put in jail are in the temple, teaching the people!вАЭ
text: K…Ыl…Ы an…Ф teli aba ebetse…Цe bal…Ы as…Ы, вАЬNo…Цio, bany…Ы g…Ы novuћГ …Фkp…Ы …Ф…ЦavuћГ…Ф, n…Ы al…Ы bal…Ы eli akaa vuћГ…Ф shu p…Ы baakas…Ы banun…Ф …Фd…ФћГ.вАЭ

ref: The captain went with some of the temple police and brought the apostles back. But they did not use force. They were afraid that the people might start throwing stones at them.
text: Kliso…Ф, ag…Ыe…Цi akaavuћГ…Ф nabha …Фpl…Ыn…Ф y…Ыax…ФћГ…Ыw…Фaa av…Ы ad…Ыgbana ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы amana. Bag…Ы gbanaћА bal…Ы n…Ы t…ЫgagaliћГ m…Ы, …Фm…Фs…Ы beesi kifuћА as…Ы bag…Ы akpas…Ы b…Фd…ФћГ ebehu al…Ы aklagbu.

ref: When the apostles were brought before the council, the high priest said to them,
text: G…Ы bagbana ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы amana, bak…Ф bal…Ф…Ыititi n…Ы …Фham…ЫeshesheћА…Ы nam…Ы t…Ы ban…ФluћГazazaћГ gbagbla ebisi bal…Ы ebui.

ref: вАЬWe told you plainly not to teach in the name of Jesus. But look what you have done! You have been teaching all over Jerusalem, and you are trying to blame us for his death.вАЭ
text: Etse…Цe al…Ы as…Ы, вАЬB…Фkp…Ы …Фsha k…Ф w…Фn…Ф gagaliћГ …Фs…Ы n…Фt…Фk…Ф kas…Ы b…Фd…ФћГ n…Ы kinye …Ыl…Ы m…Ы, p…Ф, n…Фk…Ф w…Фn…Ф b…Фd…ФћГ kakas…Ы tsy…Фa Yerusalem k…Ыl…Ы n…Фp…Ы …Фs…Ы t…ЫћА b…Ф≈ЛaћГ k…Ыp…Ф n…Ы any…Ы al…Ы dzyosu n…Ф shu.вАЭ

ref: Peter and the apostles replied: We don't obey people. We obey God.
text: Petro n…ЫћА ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы g…Фg…Ф…Ы ebuiliuluћГ as…Ы, вАЬk…Ыl…Ы …Фs…Ы buluћГ bat…ФћГ …Фk…Ф Owusoso Akaa …Фd…Ы ban…Фdzyrame!

ref: You killed Jesus by nailing him to a cross. But the God our ancestors worshiped raised him to life
text: B…Фl…Ф akaal…Ы Owusoso Akaa, y…Ыefeke Yesu…Ф eden…Ф bekpu…Ф m…Ы, an…Ф g…Ы n…Фkpiis…ФћГ n…Ы busi shu p…Ы noyii.

ref: and made him our Leader and Savior. Then God gave him a place at his right side, so that the people of Israel would turn back to him and be forgiven.
text: Owusoso Akaa akpii n…ЫititiћБ p…Ы al…Фk…Ф…Ы edzu y…Ы≈ЛaћГ m…Ы as…Ы Ekusi n…ЫћА an…Ф g…Ы ebe Bhui ban…Ф ebuћА as…Ы t…Ы ak…Ф Israelan…Ы etsyina etuћБ…Ф m…Ы, t…Ы bal…Фk…Ф bal…Ы ebui kpa etsye al…Ы.

ref: We are here to tell you about all this, and so is the Holy Spirit, who is God's gift to everyone who obeys God.
text: B…Фl…Ф n…ЫћА ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa GbangbaћГ g…Ы Owusoso Akaa ak…Ф bag…Ы eluћГ y…Ыat…Ф…ФћГ b…Фl…Ф zaћГm…Ф ebui al…Ы.вАЭ

ref: When the council members heard this, they became so angry they wanted to kill the apostles.
text: G…Ы beluћГ kibui …Ыl…Ы, …Фm…Фp…Ф…Ы oyiћБ al…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bap…Ы as…Ы t…Ы beyi al…Ы.

ref: But one of the members was the Pharisee Gamaliel, a highly respected teacher. He ordered the apostles to be taken out of the room for a little while.
text: P…Ф Farisieyi teli g…Ы bezekulu as…Ы Gamaliel g…Ы edziћА …Фshad…Фkas…Ы p…Ы ban…Ф ad…Ыm…Ы n…Ы y…Ы…Ы, aba al…Ф…ЫtitiћБ n…Ы …ФhaeshesheћА…Ы nam…Ы k…Ыl…Ы ak…Ф …Фsha as…Ы bebuћА ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы eyin…Ф …Фt…ФћГ …Ыb…Ф…Ы.

ref: Then he said to the council: Men of Israel, be careful what you do with these men.
text: K…Ыl…Ы a…Ц…Ф etse…Цe al…Ы as…Ы, вАЬIsraelan…Ы, no…Цi piapii n…Ы k…Ыg…Ы n…Ф…Фt…Ф…Ц…Ф …Фs…Ы t…Ы n…Фbh…Ыt…Ы n…ЫћА ban…Ф al…Ы shu m…Ф.

ref: Later, when the people of our nation were being counted, Judas from Galilee showed up. A lot of people followed him, but he was killed, and all his followers were scattered.
text: N…Ы yiede…Ы, Galilea eyiћА teli tsy…Ы g…Ы bezekulu as…Ы Yuda ebekoeyiћА, n…Ы ewui al…Ы m…Ы g…Ы bazakalaћА banun…Ф k…Ыl…Ы agbana ban…Ф kpekpeћА apl…Ыn…Ф y…Ыishu p…Ы bagaliћГ bat…ФћГ m…Ы. Beyii tsy…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы b…Фp…ФћГ…Ы yiede azazaћГ petee tsy…Ы akanaћА.

ref: So I advise you to stay away from these men. Leave them alone. If what they are planning is something of their own doing, it will fail.
text: Kliso…Ф kibui …Ыl…Ы otsi…Ы n…Ф, ihu buluhuћГ …Фk…Ф w…Фn…Ф …Фs…Ы, N…Фsh…Ыn…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы ban…Ф al…Ы shu! N…Фk…Ф bagav…Ы! ∆Жm…Фs…Ы onup…Ы k…Ыg…Ы bat…Ф…Ц…Ф n…ЫћА bal…Ы ebui bh…Ыbh…Ыt…Ы m…Ы enu ban…Фdzyrame ay…Ы…Ы, lat…Ы bam…Ф otugbaћА v…Ыv…Ы.

ref: But if God is behind it, you cannot stop it anyway, unless you want to fight against God. The council members agreed with what he said,
text: P…Ф, onup…Ы Owusoso Akaa …Фk…Ф lede…Ы x…Фn…Ф…Ф, n…Фt…Ы b…ФlaћА …Фbh…Ыt…Ы …Фs…Ы ban…Ф al…Ы baz…Фk…Ф y…Фl…Ф e…Цi, p…Ф n…Фb…Фm…Ф w…Фn…Ф ishu …Фs…Ы n…Фg…Фl…ЫћГ iboe n…ЫћА Owusoso Akaa.вАЭ

ref: and they called the apostles back in. They had them beaten with a whip and warned them not to speak in the name of Jesus. Then they let them go.
text: Y…Ыibui …Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф k…Ф beluћГ ebui esi, kliso…Ф bekulu ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы amana k…Ыl…Ы bak…Ф behuisi al…Ы. K…Ыl…Ы bakp…Ы …Фsha ak…Ф al…Ы …Фs…Ы bat…Ы a…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф n…Ы Yesu y…Ыinye…Ы m…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bash…Ыn…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы bal…Ыishu p…Ы bash…Ы.

ref: The apostles left the council and were happy, because God had considered them worthy to suffer for the sake of Jesus.
text: Ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы ash…Ы n…Ы kebhu okuluk…Ф n…ЫћА same, …Фm…Фs…Ы bakalaћА bal…Ы as…Ы ban…Ф g…Ы bash…Фn…Ф as…Ы bam…Ф b…Фt…Ф n…ЫћА awuiћГ n…Ы Yesu y…Ыinye…Ы n…Ы takpu.

ref: Every day they spent time in the temple and in one home after another. They never stopped teaching and telling the good news that Jesus is the Messiah.
text: Keliza, elizaa m…Ы…Ы, ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы azaћГ b…Фd…ФћГ kakas…Ы nabha n…Ы akaavuћГ…Ф shu, n…ЫћА oden…Ф b…ФpaћГ m…Ы …Фv…Ыn…Ф b…ФpaћГ m…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bag…Ы z…Фk…Ф y…Фl…Ф n…ЫћА bal…Ы b…Фd…ФћГ kakas…Ы n…ЫћА kibui gbangbaћГ t…Ы…Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф …Фs…Ы Yesu y…Ыenu Kristo…Ф.

ref: A lot of people were now becoming followers of the Lord. But some of the ones who spoke Greek started complaining about the ones who spoke Aramaic. They complained that the Greek-speaking widows were not given their share when the food supplies were handed out each day.
text: N…Ы ewui al…Ы m…Ы, g…Ы bad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы t…ЫkaklaћА m…Ы zikpeћА t…Ф…Ц…Ф…Ф, Helan…Ы g…Ыenu Yudan…Ы g…ЫazaћГ bal…Ыishi…Ы bazakpam…Ы ishu n…Ы Hebrian…Ы g…Ыenu Yudan…Ы shu, …Фm…Фs…Ы beebhui Helan…Ы bav…Ыv…Ы edzyini al…Ы bho kibe nyia be n…Ы b…Ф≈Лa≈ЛaћГ tibubuћБ …Фk…Ф al…Ы m…Ы.

ref: The twelve apostles called the whole group of followers together and said, вАЬWe should not give up preaching God's message in order to serve at tables.
text: Kliso ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы l…Фf…Ф n…ЫћА taabha ekulu bad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы petee eshogoћА p…Ы betse…Цe al…Ы as…Ы, вАЬK…Ыma …Ыl…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф …Фs…Ы b…Фsh…Ыn…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы Owusoso Akaa ebui…Ы t…Ы…Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф shu, t…ЫћА buzi…Цi b…Ф≈Лa≈ЛaћГ t…Ыk…Фk…Ф an…Ф ebui shu.

ref: My friends, choose seven men who are respected and wise and filled with God's Spirit. We will put them in charge of these things.
text: Kliso, m…Ыadzya al…Ы m…Ф, nobu bany…Ы tegegene n…Ы w…Фn…Ф…Ыshi g…Ы nonyi …Фs…Ы, ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa GbangbaћГ n…ЫћА bubutiћА kpas…Ы al…Ы m…Ы, b…ФbaћА l…Фk…Ф k…Ыx…ФћГ…Ы …Ыl…Ы kp…Ы ah…Ф…Ы …Фk…Ф al…Ы

ref: We can spend our time praying and serving God by preaching.вАЭ
text: t…Ы k…Ыk…Ф b…Фm…Ф kibeћА …Фk…Ф Owusoso Akaa tikukulu n…ЫћА y…Ыibui…Ы t…Ы…Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф.вАЭ

ref: This suggestion pleased everyone, and they began by choosing Stephen. He had great faith and was filled with the Holy Spirit. Then they chose Philip, Prochorus, Nicanor, Timon, Parmenas, and also Nicolaus, who worshiped with the Jewish people in Antioch.
text: K…Ыzaa pete ad…Ыm…Ы at…Ф…Ц…Ф kibui …Ыl…Ы g…Ы bakp…Ы amana nabha. Bebu Stefano, an…Ф g…Ы t…Ыy…Ыy…Ыk…Ы≈ЛaћГ n…ЫћА ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa GbangbaћГ oyuku y…Ы m…Ы n…ЫћА Filipo, Prokoro, Nikanora, Timona, Parmena n…ЫћА Nikanao, an…Ф g…Ы akp…Ы takpu esi ak…Ф ibudi p…Ы ebetsyina edzi Yudaeyi g…Ы ede Antioxia.

ref: These men were brought to the apostles. Then the apostles prayed and placed their hands on the men to show they had been chosen to do this work.
text: Bebu ban…Ф al…Ы akas…Ы ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bekulu Owusoso Akaa p…Ы bat…Ф…Ц…Ф bal…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы bal…Ы abha.

ref: God's message spread, and many more people in Jerusalem became followers. Even a large number of priests put their faith in the Lord. Stephen Is Arrested
text: Kidzo …Ыl…Ы nabha Owusoso Akaa ibui…Ы y…Ы…Ыv…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы n…Ы Yerusalem bezekpeћА at…Ф…Ц…Ф ziazia, k…Ыl…Ы ban…ФluћГazazaћГ kpekpeћА teli ebeluћГ bat…Ф esi ak…Ф t…Ыy…Ыy…Ыk…Ы≈ЛaћГ. Stefano TivuvuћГ

ref: God gave Stephen the power to work great miracles and wonders among the people.
text: Stefano an…Ф g…Ы Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibu n…ЫћА ohumi …ФzaћГ y…Ыm…Ы, abh…Ыt…Ы atsyindzye ebui n…ЫћА ebui g…Ы labh…Ыt…Ы ibiћА n…Ы banun…Ф n…Ыishi bam…Ф.

ref: But some men from Cyrene and Alexandria were members of a group who called themselves вАЬFree Men.вАЭ They started arguing with Stephen. Some others from Cilicia and Asia also argued with him.
text: P…Ф kititiћА l…Фl…Ф babaћБ, oden…Ф …Фtsy…Фak…Ф banun…Ф g…Ы bam…Ф ishuah…Ф…Ыm…Ы zazaћГa, g…Ыenu Yudan…Ы g…Ыede Kirene n…ЫћА Aleksandro, k…Ыl…Ы beteli tsy…Ы ede Kilikia n…ЫћА Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы. Ban…Ф al…Ы akpaћА ebui wl…Фak…Ы n…ЫћА Stefano,

ref: But they were no match for Stephen, who spoke with the great wisdom that the Spirit gave him.
text: p…Ф, bag…Ы lazaћГ y…ЫubutiћА n…ЫћА ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa n…Ф g…Ы …Фl…Ы y…Ыal…Фk…Ф aza…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф nuluћГ.

ref: So they talked some men into saying, вАЬWe heard Stephen say terrible things against Moses and God!вАЭ
text: Kliso n…Ы tikpukpuћГ m…Ы…Ы, baw…Ф…Ы ban…Ф teli uluћГ as…Ы ba…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАЬBuluћГ Stefano y…Ыa…Ц…Ф ebuso ebui n…Ы Mose n…ЫћА Owusoso Akaa shu.вАЭ

ref: They turned the people and their leaders and the teachers of the Law of Moses against Stephen. Then they all grabbed him and dragged him in front of the council.
text: Kliso ba…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф etsuifuћБ akp…Ы …Фma b…Фn…Ф beshesheћА…Ы n…ЫћА …Фshad…Фkas…Ы m…Ы. BevuћГ Stefano k…Ыl…Ы bagbana y…Ыamana ∆ЖhaeshesheћА…Ы …Фk…Ф.

ref: Some men agreed to tell lies about Stephen, and they said, вАЬThis man keeps on saying terrible things about this holy temple and the Law of Moses.
text: Ba…Ц…Ф as…Ыn…Ы ebui n…Ыishu as…Ы, вАЬAny…Ы al…Ы at…Ы ay…Фl…ФћА ebui kpa t…Ы…Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф n…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф dadal…Ы …Фl…Ы n…ЫћА …Фshaa shu.

ref: We have heard him claim that Jesus from Nazareth will destroy this place and change the customs Moses gave us.вАЭ
text: ∆Жm…Фs…Ы buluћГ y…Ыa…Ц…Ф as…Ы Yesu Nazareteyi al…Ы abay…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф …Фl…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы ebetsyina …Ыk…Ф…Ф g…Ы Mose akp…Ы elu…Ф ak…Ф …Фl…Ф.вАЭ

ref: Then all the council members stared at Stephen. They saw that his face looked like the face of an angel.
text: ∆Жham…ЫeshesheћА…Ы g…Ы bazaћГ …Ыk…Ыl…Ы petee edzu awuhuћГ n…Ы y…Ыabha, k…Ыl…Ы bam…Ф as…Ы yam…Ы edziћА as…Ы ax…ФћГ…Ыd…Ы ay…Ы m…ЫћА ana.

ref: The high priest asked Stephen, вАЬAre they telling the truth about you?вАЭ
text: K…Ыl…Ы …ФzaћГk…Фan…Ф gbagbla ebisi y…Ыas…Ы, вАЬEbui al…Ы g…Ы bal…Фk…Ф ebhui w…ФluћГ…Ф n…Ф enu ebui gbaћГ dza?вАЭ

ref: Stephen answered: Friends, listen to me. Our glorious God appeared to our ancestor Abraham while he was still in Mesopotamia, before he had moved to Haran.
text: Ebu kibui …Ыl…Ы uluћГ as…Ы, вАЬM…Ыadzya al…Ы, n…Ы m…Ыakaa al…Ы, n…Фtaat…Ф n…Ы m…Ы! N…Ы kibe …Ыl…Ы g…Ы b…Фl…Ф ashuiћГ Abraham azaћГ Mesopotamia n…Ф, Owusoso Akaa Ishudadal…Ы elete…Ы ebu y…Ыishu akas…Ы y…Ы n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы flogo p…Ы Abraham ebetuћБ av…Ы Xaram.

ref: God told him, вАЬLeave your country and your relatives and go to a land that I will show you.вАЭ
text: Owusoso Akaa a…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАШTu …Фsh…Ы n…Ы w…Ф kesiakpa, n…ЫћА w…Ф eshopo al…Ы …Фbha t…Ы …Фv…Ы kesiakpa g…Ы …Ыbakas…Ы w…Ф nabha.вАЩ

ref: Then Abraham left the land of the Chaldeans and settled in Haran. After his father died, Abraham came and settled in this land where you now live.
text: Kliso etuћБ ash…Ы n…Ы Kaldea kesiakpa nabha p…Ы ad…ЫzaћГ Xaram. N…Ы y…Ыakaa butsi niede…Ы, Owusoso Akaa as…Ыsii n…Ы kesiakpa al…Ы abha g…Ы n…Фl…Ы otsi…Ы n…Ф.

ref: God didn't give him any part of it, not even a square meter. But God did promise to give it to him and his family forever, even though Abraham didn't have any children.
text: Ag…Ы k…Ф…Ы ka≈ЛaћГsi nanaћА n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы p…Ы oboyi kesiakpa kal…Ы kats…Ы…Ц…Ыkp…Ф tidzedze m…Ы ete tsy…Ы. P…Ф Owusoso Akaa at…Ф…Ц…Ф ak…Ф…Ы as…Ы, y…Ы n…ЫћА y…Ыeshui al…Ы abay…Ыk…Ы kesiakpa al…Ы n…Ы kibe …Ыl…Ы tsy…Ы, eyi nanaћА ag…ЫzaћГ Abraham ah…Ф…Ы flogo.

ref: God said Abraham's descendants would live for a while in a foreign land. There they would be slaves and would be mistreated
text: Owusoso Akaa a…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф etse…Цe y…ЫћА n…Ы kidzo …Ыl…Ы nabha as…Ы, вАШWoeshui al…Ы ebedzi befuћА n…Ы kesiakpa tieli g…Ы ketinu bal…Ы ay…Ы nabha. K…Ыl…Ы babal…Фk…Ф bal…Ы as…Ы ban…Ф dzidzi ana, k…Ыl…Ы babakp…Ы al…Ы b…Фt…Ф n…Ы ag…Ф akpaћГ tal…Ы m…Ы.

ref: But he also said, вАЬI will punish the nation that makes them slaves. Then later they will come and worship me in this place.вАЭ
text: Owusoso Akaa a…Ц…Ф as…Ы, …Ыbap…ФћГ bat…ФћГ …Фk…Ф k…Ыmadi…Ы g…Ы baћАbh…Ыt…Ы al…Ы as…Ы ban…Ф dzidzi ana. Kidegbaa bebeћА koeyi n…Ы k…Ыmadi …Ыl…Ы m…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы babakp…Ы k…Ыtakpu esi ak…Ф m…Ы n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…ЫћА.вАЩ

ref: God said to Abraham, вАЬEvery son in each family must be circumcised to show you have kept your agreement with me.вАЭ So when Isaac was eight days old, Abraham circumcised him. Later, Isaac circumcised his son Jacob, and Jacob circumcised his twelve sons.
text: K…Ыl…Ы anyaћГ olugbuћГ n…ЫћА Abraham n…Ы k…Ыh…ФћГa bhui bhui shu. Kliso g…Ы Abraham am…Ф Isaki…Ы, ebhui k…Ыh…ФћГa ak…Ф…Ы n…Ы kiwui s…ЫmiћА nabha. Kidegbaa Isak abam…Ф Yakob k…Ыl…Ы Yakob tsy…Ы abam…ФћБ bashuiћГ l…Фf…Ф n…ЫћА taabha.

ref: These men were our ancestors. Joseph was also one of our famous ancestors. His brothers were jealous of him and sold him as a slave to be taken to Egypt. But God was with him
text: G…Ы bal…Фk…Ф kaw…ФћГkp…Ы n…Ы Yosef shu so…Ф, bad…ЫћА y…Ыak…Ф Egiptean…Ы as…Ы an…Ф dzidziћА ana. P…Ф, Owusoso Akaa azaћГ apl…Ыnii,

ref: and rescued him from all his troubles. God made him so wise that the Egyptian king Pharaoh thought highly of him. The king even made Joseph governor over Egypt and put him in charge of everything he owned.
text: k…Ыl…Ы ebui eden…Ф y…Ы…Фt…Ф ka nyia ka m…Ы. Ak…Ф Yosef bubutiћА g…Ы k…Ыk…Ф …Фs…Ы y…ЫibutiћА…Ы ku Egiptean…Ы ekusi Farao aw…ФћГ.

ref: Everywhere in Egypt and Canaan the grain crops failed. There was terrible suffering, and our ancestors could not find enough to eat.
text: Kliso ak…Ф y…Ыa≈ЛaћГ bukusi n…Ы Egipte kesiakpa n…ЫћА y…Ыukusi b…ФpaћГ petee abha.

ref: But when Jacob heard there was grain in Egypt, he sent our ancestors there for the first time.
text: G…Ы Yakob eluћГ as…Ы nikpeћАe al…Ы Egypte…Ы, akp…Ы b…Фl…Ф ashuiћГ al…Ы n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы d…Ыd…Ы g…Ыiput…Ф.

ref: It was on their second trip that Joseph told his brothers who he was, and the king learned about Joseph's family.
text: G…Ы baza av…Ы b…ФbhalaћА, Yosef etse…Цe y…Ыadzya al…Ы an…Ф n…ФћА …Ыdi g…Ыenu…Ф, k…Ыk…Ф …Фs…Ы Farao tsy…Ы eti Yosef y…Ыeshopo al…Ы.

ref: Joseph sent for his father and his relatives. In all, there were
text: N…Ы k…Ыl…ЫћА niede…Ы, Yosef akp…Ы ban…Ф as…Ыs…Ы y…Ыakaa Yakob n…ЫћА y…Ы…ФpaћГ petee, ban…Ф as…Ы af…Ыtegegene n…ЫћА teti ana.

ref: His father went to Egypt and died there, just as our ancestors did.
text: Kliso Yakob ebezhi av…Ы Egipte, …Ыk…Ыl…Ы y…Ы n…ЫћА b…Фl…Ф ashuiћГ al…Ы editsiћБ.

ref: Later their bodies were taken back to Shechem and placed in the tomb that Abraham had bought from the sons of Hamor.
text: Bal…Фk…Ф bal…Ы etsitsi…Ы amana Sixem ad…Ы v…Фb…Ф n…Ы odze…Цe…Ы g…Ы Abraham edzi n…ЫћА ehoeyi kpekpeћА teli eden…Ф Xam…Ф y…Ыeyi al…Ы ah…Ф…Ы m…Ы n…Ы Sixem.

ref: Finally, the time came for God to do what he had promised Abraham. By then the number of our people in Egypt had greatly increased.
text: вАЬG…Ы kibe…Ы naћА …Фs…Ы t…Ы Owusoso Akaa abh…Ыt…Ы at…Ф…Ц…Ф olugbuћГ…Ф g…Ы anyaћГ n…ЫћА Abraham abhaa, b…Фl…Ф banun…Ф n…Ы Egipte ebekpeћА at…Ф…Ц…Ф.вАЭ

ref: Another king was ruling Egypt, and he didn't know anything about Joseph.
text: K…Ыl…Ы ekusi bhlat…Ф g…Ы y…Ыetinyi k…ЫnanaћА n…Ы Yosef shu…Ф ebedzi ekusi n…Ы Egipte.

ref: He tricked our ancestors and was cruel to them. He even made them leave their babies outside, so they would die.
text: Ekusi al…Ы abh…Ыt…ЫћА k…Ыtakpu m…Ы gagaliћГ n…ЫћА b…Фl…Ф banun…Ф, k…Ыl…Ы akp…Ы b…Фl…Ф ashuiћГ al…Ы …Фt…Ф p…Ы ezetuћГil…Ы akp…Ы bal…ЫiluћГ as…Ы baћБt…Ы…Ы bal…Ы beyiv…Фv…Ф g…Ы bam…Ф as…Ы t…Ы betsiћБ.

ref: During this time Moses was born. He was a very beautiful child, and for three months his parents took care of him in their home.
text: вАЬN…Ы kibe …Ыl…Ы bam…Ф Mose, g…Ыetinu eyi ete ko. Bany…Ф nii woele tata n…Ы y…Ыakaa paћГm…Ы.

ref: Then when they were forced to leave him outside, the king's daughter found him and raised him as her own son.
text: G…Ы bebui eyin…Ф …Фt…Ф…ФћГ, Farao y…Ыeyi adz…Ы al…Фk…Ф…Ы any…Фn…Ф as…Ы y…Ыah…Ф…Ыm…Ы any…Ыnuv…Ф…Ы ana.
